payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Interior rectangular white window with closed white horizontal blinds and a white painted frame, flanked by dark blue curtains; lower-left shows a partial wooden dresser obstructing the sill, and several slats are slightly misaligned near the bottom — camera appears approximately 2.0 meters away.
